headline: Is the bond market still a safe haven?
summary: BlackRock Global co-head of bond ETFs Steve Laipply sits down with Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to discuss whether the bond market (^FVX, ^TNX, ^TYX) is still a safe haven for investors.

headline: Can Private Credit and Software Stocks Lift Markets? BlackRock Holds the Key.
summary: After a rocky start to the year, two key market segments, private credit and software-related stocks, appear to be finding support at the same time.  Private credit, a major source of financing for software companies and an area that has raised concerns for some banks, seems to be stabilizing.

raw.headline: Can Private Credit and Software Stocks Lift Markets? BlackRock Holds the Key.

headline: It's Starting To Feel A Lot Like 2007
summary: Current market conditions closely resemble the pre-crisis environment of 2007 in several primary ways, raising caution for investors. Read the full analysis here.

headline: BlackRock's Blunt Warning: Treasuries Won't Save Your Portfolio This Time
summary: BlackRock warns the old stock‑down, bond‑up playbook is breaking as energy shocks and inflation hit portfolios, forcing investors to rethink diversification and where real protection now exists.

headline: Fidelity Sees Calm During Private Credit Frenzy, 'Remains A Compelling Asset Class'

headline: 3 Growth ETFs to Buy in 2026 and Hold Until Your Portfolio Hits 7 Figures
summary: Building a seven-figure portfolio from scratch requires one thing above almost everything else: time in the market, compounded through funds that systematically own the companies driving the economy forward. Growth ETFs are the most direct vehicle for that. They screen specifically for companies with above-average earnings and revenue expansion, filtering out the slow-movers that drag ... 3 Growth ETFs to Buy in 2026 and Hold Until Your Portfolio Hits 7 Figures
